title: Community Roads and Access Works
summary: Priority works for access roads, drainage and local public spaces in hinterland communities.

title: Market and Sanitation Upgrades
summary: Improvement of municipal markets, drainage channels and waste collection points.

title: Drainage and Community Enhancement
summary: Drainage maintenance, community roads and public infrastructure upgrades.

title: Municipal Infrastructure Improvements
location: New Amsterdam and Region Six NDCs
summary: Upgrading high-traffic municipal spaces, culverts and community service points.
